많다."}]]}]]}]]}]}]],"notFoundStyles":[]}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"promo-banner","children":["$","a",null,{"href":"https://ilsanroom.pages.dev","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener →"}]}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"footer","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"footer-links","children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/clubs/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer","children":"클럽"}],["$","a",null,{"href":"/nights/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer","children":"나이트"}],["$","a",null,{"href":"/lounges/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener →"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"style":{"color":"#333"},"children":["© ",2026," 골드나잇 가이드. 만 19세 이상 이용 가능."]}],["$","p",null,{"style":{"marginTop":"0.5rem","fontSize":"0.8rem","color":"#555"},"children":"본
